creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
I've been running into this periodically for the
last week. I finally took the time about 10 minute
ago to see if my suspicion was correct;
I use the likws of: make -DBATCH ... when testing
ports (note the -D here). Removing -DBATCH from the
incantation, removes the error && message. I haven't
chased the anomaly any further. But hope this helps.

--Chris
